what: Implement ArchiveProject and RestoreProject commands using soft-delete semantics with deletedAt timestamps and explicit behavior when archived project was active.

where.description: Add archive command handler setting deletedAt and handling active-project side effects.
Add restore command handler clearing deletedAt.
Add tests for archive and restore including active fallback interactions.

acceptance.then: Project receives deletedAt timestamp and active context is reassigned to a valid fallback or onboarding-required state.

acceptance.given: A restore command targeting a project id that does not exist
acceptance.then: The command returns a not-found error and no other project state changes.

context: Archive/restore is required for safe lifecycle management and reversible operations in local project catalog.
technicalNotes: Persist deletedAt and avoid physical deletion. Merge-safe: add dedicated command files and tests, avoid touching unrelated feature routers. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
